system.benefit: Can use Servo-harness and its weapons
system.description: The Techmarine has had his implanted systems integrated with a many-armed servo harness, allowing him to use its pincer-arms and weapon arrays as if they were extra limbs of his body. The Techmarine may be fitted with and use a Servo-harness (see page 177 in Chapter V: Armoury) and may use weapons fitted to the harness in which he is proficient.
